item.title: RayMol 1.3.2
item.description:
## RayMol 1.3.2
A critical fix for a startup crash that prevented 1.3.1 from launching on most Macs.
- **Fixed: app quit immediately on launch with "Library not loaded".** The 1.3.1 build linked its font and image libraries (freetype, libpng) from a developer Homebrew path that isn't present on a normal Mac, so the app crashed at startup before its window ever appeared. RayMol now bundles those libraries inside the app, so it launches on any supported Mac with nothing else installed.
If you downloaded 1.3.1 and it wouldn't open, grab this build (the DMG below) and it will work. Everything from 1.3.1 is included: animated Zoom / Orient / Center camera actions, outline color & width controls, one-click AI connect, and the offscreen/transparent-background export fixes.
Built on the open-source PyMOL engine. Updates install automatically via the in-app updater (**Check for Updates…** in the app menu).
